purpose: Valibot is a modular, type-safe schema library for TypeScript/JavaScript. It validates unknown data (server payloads, forms, config) at runtime while providing static type inference. Its modular API enables tree-shaking for very small bundles (starting <700 bytes) and supports primitives through complex objects via composable schemas, pipelines (validation/transformation actions), and async variants.

public_api.name: object
public_api.summary: Create an object schema from a map of key-to-schema entries.

public_api.name: string
public_api.summary: Schema that validates string values.

public_api.name: number
public_api.summary: Schema that validates number values.

public_api.name: boolean
public_api.summary: Schema that validates boolean values.

public_api.name: array
public_api.summary: Schema that validates arrays of a given item schema.

public_api.name: pipe
public_api.summary: Compose a schema with validation/transformation actions.

public_api.name: email
public_api.summary: Pipe action validating email strings.

public_api.name: minLength
public_api.summary: Pipe action requiring minimum length.

public_api.name: parse
public_api.summary: Parse input against schema; throws on validation issues.

public_api.name: safeParse
public_api.summary: Non-exception parse returning a result object with success/issues.

public_api.name: is
public_api.summary: Type guard function returning boolean for schema validity.

public_api.name: parser
public_api.summary: Create a reusable parser function for a schema.

public_api.name: safeParser
public_api.summary: Create a reusable safe parser function for a schema.

public_api.name: InferOutput
public_api.summary: Type utility inferring the output type of a schema.

public_api.name: InferInput
public_api.summary: Type utility inferring the input type of a schema.

public_api.name: InferIssue
public_api.summary: Type utility inferring the issue type of a schema.

public_api.name: optional
public_api.summary: Wrap schema to accept undefined.

public_api.name: nullable
public_api.summary: Wrap schema to accept null.

public_api.name: nullish
public_api.summary: Wrap schema to accept null or undefined.

public_api.name: union
public_api.summary: Schema matching any of the provided option schemas.

public_api.name: intersect
public_api.summary: Schema requiring all provided schemas to match.

public_api.name: picklist
public_api.summary: Schema matching one of a set of literal values.

public_api.name: literal
public_api.summary: Schema matching an exact literal value.

public_api.name: enum
public_api.summary: Schema matching values of a TypeScript enum.

public_api.name: record
public_api.summary: Schema for object records with key/value schemas.

public_api.name: tuple
public_api.summary: Schema for fixed-length tuples.

public_api.name: lazy
public_api.summary: Defer schema creation to support recursive schemas.

public_api.name: transform
public_api.summary: Pipe action transforming the parsed value.

public_api.name: check
public_api.summary: Pipe action performing a custom boolean validation.

public_api.name: fallback
public_api.summary: Provide a fallback value on validation failure.

public_api.name: parseAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of parse for async schemas/actions.

public_api.name: safeParseAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of safeParse.

public_api.name: pipeAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of pipe supporting async actions.

public_api.name: objectAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of object.

public_api.name: ValiError
public_api.summary: Error class thrown by parse containing issues.

public_api.name: flatten
public_api.summary: Flatten issues into a nested error structure.

public_api.name: getDotPath
public_api.summary: Get dot-notation path string for an issue.

public_api.name: isValiError
public_api.summary: Check whether a value is a ValiError instance.

usage_patterns.title: Define and parse a schema
usage_patterns.body: Import the library namespace (import * as v from 'valibot'), compose a schema with v.object/v.string/etc., optionally chain validations via v.pipe, then validate with v.parse (throws) or v.safeParse (result object). Use v.is as a type guard.

usage_patterns.title: Infer TypeScript types
usage_patterns.body: Use v.InferOutput<typeof Schema> to derive the parsed output type, and v.InferInput for the accepted input type. This keeps runtime schema and compile-time types in sync without duplication.

usage_patterns.title: Pipelines for validation/transformation
usage_patterns.body: Use v.pipe(baseSchema, action1, action2, ...) to attach actions such as v.email(), v.minLength(n), v.transform(...), v.check(...). Pipelines enable tree-shaking since only used actions are bundled.

usage_patterns.title: Async validation
usage_patterns.body: For async checks or transforms use the *Async counterparts: v.objectAsync, v.pipeAsync, v.parseAsync, v.safeParseAsync. Do not mix sync parse with async schemas.

gotchas: parse throws on validation failure; use safeParse for non-exception-based flows.
Async actions require the *Async schema/pipe/parse variants.
Modular design means each function must be imported (or use `import * as v`) — dot-chaining methods like Zod is not available.
Bundle-size claims (<700 B, up to 95% vs Zod) depend on which schemas/actions you actually import.

examples.title: Login schema with parse
